name: cloud-backup-platform
description: Cloud Disaster Recovery & Backup Platform - Root

scripts.install:all: npm run install:auth && npm run install:backup && npm run install:upload && npm run install:restore && npm run install:notification && npm run install:analytics && npm run install:scheduler && npm run install:frontend
scripts.start:all: concurrently --names "AUTH,BACKUP,UPLOAD,RESTORE,NOTIFY,ANALYTICS,SCHEDULER,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,cyan" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:backup" "npm run start:upload" "npm run start:restore" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:analytics" "npm run start:scheduler" "npm run start:frontend"

author: Your Name
